questions.clue: Evidence of habitation dating to around 9000 BCE, some 11,000 years ago, makes this West Bank city one of the oldest continuously inhabited places in the world.

citations.title: Jericho
citations.snippet: Jericho is a city in the West Bank, Palestine, and the capital of the Jericho Governorate. The city is located in the Jordan Valley, with the Jordan River to the east and Jerusalem to the west.
